description_long: This rifle features a robust wooden stock with a smooth, slightly curved profile, providing a classic and ergonomic grip. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel extending forward and featuring a series of elongated cooling slots along the upper handguard. A prominent drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity feeding system. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible, and the iron sights are integrated into the top of the barrel and receiver. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, combining utilitarian metalwork with traditional wood furniture.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal receiver and barrel, and a prominent drum magazine beneath the action.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, metal receiver, barrel with cooling slots, and the drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine, barrel muzzle, and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the full length of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the back of the drum magazine.
